spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the exact value of isTopLevel and visibilityState in prioritizing crashes.

interactive.rationale: Fully interactive dashboard featuring real-visible burst, iframe burst, mixed traffic simulation, and reset actions.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Directly speaks to the SRE triage pain addressed by these reporting upgrades.

edge_cases.rationale: Safely attempts to bind a passive real ReportingObserver to record actual browser crashes if available.

references.rationale: Links to WICG issues #20 and #14 highlighting motivation.

design_system.rationale: Clear quadrant visual styling matching the CSS framework norms.

summary: A highly engaging triage burst dashboard making the engineering/SRE value proposition of the new fields concrete.
